message:
refactor: use Into conversion for ChildSpec name and depends_on fields

Replace .to_string() with .into() for ChildSpec name and depends_on
fields in tests, leveraging the From<&str> impl on ChildName for
more idiomatic construction. Also update conformance_child_depends
signature to accept Vec<ChildName> instead of Vec<String>.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
